exercises.code:
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import List

@dataclass
class ClientRecord:
    client_id: str
    names: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)

c = ClientRecord("C001", ["Ana"])
print(c)

exercises.code:
from dataclasses import dataclass
from decimal import Decimal

@dataclass(frozen=True)
class Transaction:
    tx_id: str
    amount: Decimal
    currency: str = "PEN"

print(Transaction("T1", Decimal("10.50")))

exercises.code:
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import List

@dataclass
class Good:
    tags: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)

a, b = Good(), Good()
a.tags.append("x")
print("default_factory aisla", a.tags, b.tags)
print("nunca uses = [] compartido entre instancias de dataclass")
